name: Hydropower Telemetry
description: Hydropower energy generation tracking schema aligned with ACM0002.

flowRate.description: Water flow rate in cubic meters per second (m³/s)

energyOutput.description: Net electricity supplied to the grid (MWh)

gatewayDID.description: DID of the gateway device signing the telemetry

signature.description: Digital signature of the telemetry data

nonce.description: Unique nonce to prevent replay attacks
